title: picea asperata subsp. notabilis
intro: Picea asperata subsp. notabilis, commonly known as the notabilis spruce, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Picea asperata subsp. notabilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or added to topical creams for its therapeutic benefits.
